creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
That's good but I see several issues.

#1) your commands in the install targets are masked with "@".  This is against policy (even if it was there before)

#2) wen@ isn't the maintainer, so it means your patch wasn't generated against the latest tree.

#3) there's no point to a pre-install and do-install target.  They should be combined to a single "do-install" target.

That's just a 5-second review
